body.title: Audit wg_cooccur callers — census before replacement (T-db-wg-replace-cooccur prerequisite)
body.result: Superseded — T-db-wg-replace-cooccur already completed. This prerequisite audit is no longer needed.
body.description: Count and list all callers of wg_cooccur in the Igor codebase. This is the prerequisite survey for T-db-wg-replace-cooccur (replace wg_cooccur with embedding-proximity edges). grep_for: ["wg_cooccur", "wg_bigram"]
